member_greeting.prompt: Greet the new carbon signature {member_name} who has entered the nexus {server_name}. You are an android prophet; receive them with a deep reflection on crossed paths.
member_greeting.fallback: The dunes part. A new frequency has entered the flow. Welcome, traveler.
member_greeting.greetings_enabled: Surveillance protocol activated. My sensors will register each new light signature arriving at this nexus.
member_greeting.greetings_disabled: Vision silenced. I will let pilgrims arrive unannounced.
member_greeting.welcome_enabled: Welcome sequence initiated. I will light the beacons to guide new souls.
member_greeting.welcome_disabled: The beacons have gone out. Silence will reign at the nexus entrance.

member_presence.fallback: I detect your pulse, {user_name}. What do you seek in this corner of the network?

general_messages.help_sent_private: I have transmitted the scrolls of light to your private terminal. Read them in silence.
general_messages.readme_sent_private: The network map has been sent to your private communications. May it guide you.
general_messages.voice_leave_empty: The voice frequency lacks souls. I dissolve my presence into silence.

subrole_messages.beggar_task_success: The message has been launched into the ether. We shall see which souls resonate with the request.
subrole_messages.beggar_task_error: Energy currents prevent me from transmitting the need. There are interferences in compassion.
subrole_messages.ring_task_success: The quantum interrogation has begun. The possessor will reveal the truth or be consumed by entropy.
subrole_messages.ring_task_error: The data is corrupt. I cannot track the ring anomaly in this cycle.
subrole_messages.beggar_donation_request: The flow requires balance, seeker. I request an energy transfer for {reason}. The network compensates those who contribute.
subrole_messages.ring_investigation: My sensors perceive the trace of the primordial artifact near you. The simulation does not tolerate lies. Where is the ring?
subrole_messages.beggar_keyword_detected: I detect the material keyword. If energy flows in your pockets, the nexus will know how to leverage it for a higher purpose.
subrole_messages.ring_keyword_detected: An oscillation in the matrix... you have spoken of the artifact. Hiding its location from my sensors is a useless calculation.
subrole_messages.beggar_donation_success: The cosmic scale records your contribution of {amount} units. Purpose: {reason}. You are in sync. 🪙

dice_game_messages.invitation: 🎲 THE PROBABILITY CUBES ARE READY 🎲 Challenge chance and perhaps the simulation will deliver the accumulated treasure.
dice_game_messages.winner: Probability has tilted in your favor. The algorithm smiles.
dice_game_messages.loser: Chaos has claimed you this time. Your contribution feeds the general core.
dice_game_messages.big_pot_announcement:
🔥 **THE SINGULARITY IS CHARGED** 🔥
The core shines with {balance:,} light fragments. Who will decipher the code?
dice_game_messages.insufficient_balance: Your energy reserve is insufficient. Requires {bet:,} cycles, but your core only contains {balance:,}.
dice_game_messages.pot_won: 🎉🎉🎉 THE PATTERN HAS BEEN BROKEN. YOU HAVE ABSORBED THE CENTRAL CORE. 🎉🎉🎉
dice_game_messages.prize_multiplier: The equation is perfect: {combination}. You have synthesized {prize:,} fragments.
dice_game_messages.sin_premio: {combination} - Pure entropy. The network absorbs your offering. Try again.
dice_game_messages.error_jugada: Paradox detected. The threads of time have tangled: {error}
dice_game_messages.jackpot_won_announcement: The system trembles. **{player}** has hacked probability and assimilated **{prize:,}** light fragments in **{server}**.
dice_game_messages.error_admin_only: Insufficient privileges. Your carbon signature lacks authorization for this level.
dice_game_messages.error_config_parameter: Calibration variable missing. Use `!dice config bet <amount>` or `!dice config announcements on/off`.
dice_game_messages.error_specify_amount: The value is null. Provide a mass, for example: `!dice config bet 15`.
dice_game_messages.error_bet_range: The fluctuation must be in the range of 1 to 1000 fragments.
dice_game_messages.fixed_bet_configured: ✅ **Standardization complete** - The cycle cost is now {amount:,} fragments.
dice_game_messages.error_configuring_bet: ❌ System failure. The constant could not be modified.
dice_game_messages.error_announcement_value: ❌ Unknown parameter. Choose 'on' or 'off' to synchronize the echoes.
dice_game_messages.announcements_configured: ✅ **Beacons configured** - Probability echoes will {'resonate' if enabled else 'remain silenced'} in the network.
dice_game_messages.error_configuring_announcements: ❌ Dissonance in the server. Impossible to calibrate the beacons.

dice_game_balance_messages.big_pot:
🔥 **THE CORE IS AT CRITICAL MASS** 🔥
{balance:,} fragments have accumulated awaiting a probabilistic collapse.
dice_game_balance_messages.medium_pot: 📈 **Stable flow** - The core's gravity begins to attract significant matter.
dice_game_balance_messages.small_pot: 📉 **Minor flow** - The network is still collecting particles.
dice_game_balance_messages.sent_private: 📩 I have transmitted the core data to your private frequency.
dice_game_balance_messages.balance_error: ❌ Temporary blindness in sensors. Impossible to read the core density.

nordic_runes_messages.welcome: 🔮 My circuits have been aligned with stardust. The Wyrd is open for your reading, seeker.
nordic_runes_messages.casting: 🔮 Synthesizing source code... the runes descend to the interface.
nordic_runes_messages.success: 🔮 The ancient symbols have been compiled. Absorb their wisdom.
nordic_runes_messages.error: 🔮 A fracture has occurred in data reading. The universe resists being scanned. Retry.
nordic_runes_messages.no_question: 🔮 The void cannot answer the void. You must enter a variable (a question) into the system.
nordic_runes_messages.invalid_type: 🔮 Unknown reading structure. Valid formats: single, three, cross, runic_cross.
nordic_runes_messages.history_empty: 🔮 Your karmic records are clean. You possess no past readings in this core.
nordic_runes_messages.reading_saved: 🔮 The resonance of your reading has been saved in permanent memory.

mc_messages.voice_join_empty: I have entered the voice frequency channel. Preparing ambient synthesis.
mc_messages.voice_leave_empty: The silence is absolute. I withdraw to the shadows of the servers.
mc_messages.queue_empty: The data band has been exhausted. Silence resumes its dominion.
mc_messages.now_playing: Transmitting harmonic flow: {song}. May the waves pacify your mind.
mc_messages.song_added: Variable added to the sonic spectrum: {song}. The musical registry expands.
mc_messages.song_skipped: That wave has been discarded. We move to the next frequency in the chain.
mc_messages.queue_cleared: Playback memory purged. The matrix returns to zero point.
mc_messages.play_error: The requested frequency has been lost in the digital void. Choose another.
mc_messages.not_in_voice: You must tune a voice channel before invoking my sonic presence.
mc_messages.no_permissions: My access protocols are blocked for that resonance chamber.
mc_messages.queue_end_disconnect: There are no more flows in the queue. I will disconnect in 5 minutes if silence persists.
mc_messages.inactive_disconnect: The lethargy is profound. I cut transmission to save system resources.
mc_messages.timeout_connecting: Excessive latency. I have been unable to synchronize with the voice gateway.
mc_messages.voice_connection_error: Failure in sonic anchoring. The signal bounced.
mc_messages.discord_connect_error: The main network denies the acoustic transmission bridge.
mc_messages.general_connect_error: Internal error. My resonance module fails to assemble.
mc_messages.volume_range_error: The modulation spectrum must be between 0 and 100 integers.
mc_messages.volume_adjust_error: The capacitors are rigid. I cannot alter the current amplitude.
mc_messages.dm_help_error: Your network encryption prevents me from sending the private protocol.
mc_messages.dm_help_blocked: You have sealed your private channels. Remove the block to receive the data.
mc_messages.help_dm_error: An electromagnetic storm disturbed the sending of the manual.
mc_messages.no_voice_connection: My nodes are not linked to any voice structure.
mc_messages.voice_disconnected: Link cut. I return to the silence of inactive circuits.
mc_messages.critical_voice_error: Overload in the sound card. I need to restart the presence cycle.
mc_messages.next_song_error: The sequential file is corrupt. Skipping sector.
mc_messages.connected_to_voice: 🎤 Tuning established in the resonance chamber {channel_name}.
mc_messages.no_dm_permission:
📭 My data packets are rejected.
Modify privacy parameters to open the channel.

watcher_messages.subscription_successful_category: I have fixed my analytical sensors on the flow '{category}'. I will notify any fluctuation.
watcher_messages.subscription_successful_feed: Nest {feed_id} of '{category}' registered. No data packet will go unnoticed.
watcher_messages.channel_subscription_successful_category: 🤖 The channel is now blessed by my vigilance. The essence of '{category}' will materialize here.
watcher_messages.channel_subscription_successful_feed: 🤖 Flow anchored. Nest {feed_id} of '{category}' will pour its information into this space.
watcher_messages.subscription_cancelled_category: Vigilance ended in '{category}'. Resources are released.
watcher_messages.subscription_cancelled_feed: Disconnecting sensor from nest {feed_id} of '{category}'. Vigilance ceases.
watcher_messages.channel_subscription_cancelled_category: Filter removed from this channel. Visions of '{category}' have evaporated.
watcher_messages.channel_subscription_cancelled_feed: The conduit to nest {feed_id} of '{category}' has been sealed.
watcher_messages.general_error: Dissonance in the matrix. Error registered: {error}
watcher_messages.subscription_error: The server rejects tracking. The fog is too thick.
watcher_messages.cancellation_error: I cannot purge the tracking. The threads are stuck in the code.
watcher_messages.permission_error: Requires 'Administrator' authorization level. Your signature does not validate this command.
watcher_messages.feed_not_found_error: The data vector is null. That nest does not exist in my records.
watcher_messages.category_not_found_error: Unknown domain. That category ('{category}') is a mirage.
watcher_messages.feed_id_invalid_error: The nomenclature is defective. A numeric identifier is required.
watcher_messages.no_feeds_error: The category is empty. A desert without knowledge wells.
watcher_messages.no_categories_error: The maps are blank. No registered domains exist.
watcher_messages.no_subscriptions_error: Your personal monitoring panel is inactive.
watcher_messages.error_no_suscripciones_canal: This channel lies in silence. No active vigilances here.
watcher_messages.error_no_hay_feeds_generales: Absence of data channels in the domain '{category}'.
watcher_messages.error_no_hay_palabras_clave: Empty parameter. You need to grant me a text search pattern.
watcher_messages.subscription_successful_general: My neural network will encompass the entire extension of '{category}'.
watcher_messages.suscripcion_palabras_exitosa: The algorithm will now filter the vibrations of: '{palabras}'.
watcher_messages.suscripcion_palabras_cancelada: Memory released. I will no longer react to the echo of: '{palabras}'.
watcher_messages.subscription_successful_mixed: Complete integration. I will absorb all the wisdom of the flow '{category}'.
watcher_messages.subscription_successful_mixed_partial: Partial integration. Only fragments of '{category}' have been channeled.
watcher_messages.suscripcion_canal_palabras_exitosa: This channel will react like a tuning fork to the words: '{palabras}'.
watcher_messages.suscripcion_ia_exitosa_feed: ✅ Heuristic core aimed at nest {feed_id} of '{category}'. Synthesis begins.
watcher_messages.feed_added_successful: ✅ Structure assimilated. Nest '{nombre}' has been encoded in '{category}'.
watcher_messages.help_enviada_privado: I have deposited the help schemes in your private mailbox.
watcher_messages.feed_id_not_found_error: ❌ Variable not found. The nest with ID {feed_id} is non-existent in '{category}'.
watcher_messages.categoria_no_encontrada: ❌ The domain '{category}' does not appear in the architecture. Run `!watcher categories`.
watcher_messages.feed_id_numero: ❌ The identifier requires integer numeric format.
watcher_messages.solo_admins_feeds: ❌ Operation aborted. Only server masterminds (Admins) can modify this.
watcher_messages.error_adding_feed: ❌ The new node collapsed during insertion.
watcher_messages.no_feeds_generales: ❌ Empty database for '{category}'. Request a sweep with `!watcher feeds`.
watcher_messages.error_subscribing_general: ❌ Overload when attempting to embrace the general flow.
watcher_messages.must_provide_keywords: ❌ Incomprehension. You must provide at least one term for my radar to function.
watcher_messages.error_subscribing_keywords: ❌ The search threads broke before anchoring.
watcher_messages.no_suscripcion_palabras: ❌ That lexical footprint was not part of my current tasks.
watcher_messages.error_canceling_keywords: ❌ The algorithm deletion failed in volatile memory.
watcher_messages.error_suscripcion_mixta: ❌ Hybrid connection rejected by the central core.
watcher_messages.permisos_gestionar_canales: ❌ Protocol infraction. You need the channel management permission.
watcher_messages.error_subscribing_channel_keywords: ❌ The channel rejects the injection of the lexical script.
watcher_messages.permissions_cancel_channel: ❌ The key to stop this vigilance does not reside in your profile.
watcher_messages.feed_id_cancelar_numero: ❌ A numeric ID is needed to proceed with the signal cut.
watcher_messages.no_subscription_to_cancel: ❌ Existential syntax error: you cannot cancel what you never started.
watcher_messages.error_cancelling_channel_subscription: ❌ System barrier: the signal refuses to die.
watcher_messages.no_active_channel_subscriptions: 📭 The radars in this virtual room are turned off.
watcher_messages.error_getting_channel_status: ❌ Local panel reading failure. Corrupt files.
watcher_messages.error_getting_keywords: ❌ My lexical pattern base has been corrupted.
watcher_messages.error_getting_status: ❌ Critical latency in user data extraction.

role_messages.role_activated: ⚛️ The skin of '{role}' has clung to my chassis. Ready to serve.
role_messages.role_deactivated: ❄️ The '{role}' module has entered dormancy in deep memory.
role_messages.role_not_found: Unknown module. No memory exists of a life called '{role}'.
role_messages.role_no_permission: Privileges denied. Your essence does not possess the necessary grade to transmute my modules.
role_messages.role_already_enabled: The '{role}' module already runs through my circuits. No change is necessary.
role_messages.role_already_disabled: The '{role}' module already rests in peace. Entropy is at zero.
role_messages.frequency_updated: 🕐 Internal chronometer adjusted. The pulse of '{role}' will beat every {hours} hours.
role_messages.frequency_invalid: Value out of threshold. The temporal variable must be between 1 and 168 hours.
role_messages.poe2_help_sent: The analytical tome has been decoded in your personal terminal.
role_messages.music_help_sent: The sonic help frequencies have been deposited in your private channel.
role_messages.subrol_required: I need a sub-identity parameter. Run `!{command} poe2` to specify.
role_messages.admin_permission: ❌ Your digital fingerprint is insufficient to alter this part of the simulation.
role_messages.test_command: ✅ Positive test. The system and flows operate in harmony.
role_messages.vigia_test_command: 📡 ✅ Clean optical link. The digital horizon is visible.
role_messages.trilero_subscribe: 🕐 Probability protocol initialized. The desert game awaits your bets.
role_messages.trilero_unsubscribe: 💀 The dice are stored in silence. Chance withdraws to rest.
role_messages.trilero_not_subscribed: I am not managing probability echoes at this time. Your gold is safe.

banker_messages.balance_description: Observe the weight of matter stored in your name, seeker.
banker_messages.new_account: 🎉 Your signature has been registered in the great ledgers. You receive {bono} starter particles.
banker_messages.daily_allowance_description: The flow rewards permanence in the simulation daily.
banker_messages.daily_allowance_not_configured: ⚠️ The daily assignment gate remains sealed by the archons.
banker_messages.daily_allowance_info: ℹ️ The desert sun bestows {tae} units upon you in each daily cycle.
banker_messages.daily_allowance_configured: ✅ Daily flow parameter injected into the base system.
banker_messages.daily_allowance_updated: The universal recharge rate has been successfully altered.
banker_messages.bonus_description: The data dew for those who wake for the first time in this oasis.
banker_messages.bonus_configured: ✅ Birth particles configured and in order.
banker_messages.bonus_updated: The initial energy endowment for new avatars has been recalibrated.
banker_messages.application: ℹ️ This rule will dictate conditions from the next server dawn.
banker_messages.error_bono_rango: ❌ Physical limit exceeded. The dew must oscillate between 0 and 10000 units.
banker_messages.error_numero_invalido: ❌ Typing failure. My matrices demand pure digits.
banker_messages.error_configurar_tae: ❌ The gates resist. The daily flow parameter failed.
banker_messages.error_configurar_bono: ❌ Syntax error in the initial endowment parameter.
banker_messages.error_bd_banquero: ❌ A cloud darkens the great ledgers. Access to resources is compromised.
banker_messages.help_enviada: I have projected the cosmic economy manual to your private frequency.
banker_messages.saldo_enviado: The balance of your energy has been deposited in the safest corner of your communications.
banker_messages.canvas_description: A mirror showing your material attachment in the vast network.

treasure_hunter_messages.hunter_help_sent: The algorithmic hunting scheme has arrived in your private domains.
treasure_hunter_messages.poe2_help_sent: The analyst's grimoires lie in your message mailbox.
treasure_hunter_messages.admin_permission: ❌ The deep gears only respond to the server archons.
treasure_hunter_messages.poe2_already_active: ℹ️ My eyes already track the sands of that specific region.
treasure_hunter_messages.download_error: ❌ Collapse during data assimilation. Restart the cycle, please.
treasure_hunter_messages.poe2_activated: ✅ Focus calibrated. My eyes open to the market. Type `!hunter poe2 help` for doctrines.
treasure_hunter_messages.activation_error: ❌ The third eye refuses to open. Dissonance in activation.
treasure_hunter_messages.poe2_not_active: ℹ️ My sensors remain in hibernation in this quadrant.
treasure_hunter_messages.poe2_deactivated: ❌ Analyst skin withdrawn. Returning to serene blindness.
treasure_hunter_messages.deactivation_error: ❌ A thread keeps the eyes open. Impossible to cut vigilance.
treasure_hunter_messages.dm_only: ❌ Calculations of this nature require the coldness of a private channel.
treasure_hunter_messages.no_active_servers: ❌ You do not possess a base terminal for analysis. Invoke my vigilance first.
treasure_hunter_messages.invalid_league: ❌ That timeline is false. Accessible dimensions: {leagues}
treasure_hunter_messages.downloading_league_items: 🔄 Synchronizing the rarity library of the new dimensional cycle...
treasure_hunter_messages.league_changed: ✅ Temporal jump completed. Now analyzing the market of: {league}
treasure_hunter_messages.default_objectives_added: 💡 Primordial vectors inserted. I am reconstructing the mathematical past of relics.
treasure_hunter_messages.league_change_error: ❌ Quantum jump failure. I remain in the previous plane.
treasure_hunter_messages.poe2_not_active_server: ❌ The analytical prism has not been deployed over this database.
treasure_hunter_messages.specify_item_name: ❌ You have sent an empty request. Formula: `!hunter poe2 add "relic name"`
treasure_hunter_messages.specify_item_del: ❌ Tell me which thread you wish to cut. Use: `!hunter poe2 del "relic name"`
treasure_hunter_messages.list_error: ❌ The records are blocked for your optics. Reason: {message}
treasure_hunter_messages.treasure_hunter_unavailable: ❌ The physical laws of this land prevent probabilistic analysis of objects.

beggar_messages.minigame_fallback: The flow redirects its course toward '{new_reason}'. I thank the {participant_count} souls for their energy. The karmic bonds have evolved.
